items.title: Add position tracking - calculate current open positions from Alpaca
items.notes: Query Alpaca API to get current open positions, add to daily report. Returns 401 with placeholder keys - code handles gracefully.

items.title: Review risk config - ensure defaults are conservative enough
items.notes: Kill switch ✓, $100 loss cap ✓, 1-share positions ✓, 3 max positions ✓ - conservative enough for paper trading

items.title: Verify signal deduplication is working - check sent_signals.json
items.notes: Deduplication verified - sent_signals.json tracking working, logic in sent_signals.py functional, no duplicates detected

items.title: Research Reddit API changes - check if alternative needed
items.notes: Reddit monitor using public JSON endpoints - currently working. No API changes affecting operation. Last run March 2 2026 - data collected successfully.
